queries.question: What is the common activation status of third-party apps across all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Third_Party_Apps.is_active  from Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps join Third_Party_Apps on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id = Third_Party_Apps.app_id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: For each streaming service, show the supported third party apps and their statuses.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , third_party_apps.app_name , third_party_apps.is_active from Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps join Third_Party_Apps on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id = Third_Party_Apps.app_id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?app_name ?is_active WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps a :Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps .
  ?third_party_apps a :Third_Party_Apps .
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps p:hasThird_Party_Apps ?third_party_apps .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?third_party_apps p:app_name ?app_name .
  ?third_party_apps p:is_active ?is_active .
}

queries.question: What is the activation status of third-party apps associated with each streaming service?
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , third_party_apps.is_active from Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps join Third_Party_Apps on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id = Third_Party_Apps.app_id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?is_active WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps a :Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps .
  ?third_party_apps a :Third_Party_Apps .
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps p:hasThird_Party_Apps ?third_party_apps .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?third_party_apps p:is_active ?is_active .
}

queries.question: For every steaming service, show the supported third-party apps.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , third_party_apps.app_name from Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps join Third_Party_Apps on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id = Third_Party_Apps.app_id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?app_name WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps a :Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps .
  ?third_party_apps a :Third_Party_Apps .
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps p:hasThird_Party_Apps ?third_party_apps .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_third_party_apps p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?third_party_apps p:app_name ?app_name .
}

queries.question: Which third party apps are supported by all streaming services at the same time and what are their statuses?
queries.sql: SELECT Third_Party_Apps.app_name, Third_Party_Apps.is_active  from Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps join Third_Party_Apps on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id = Third_Party_Apps.app_id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Give me the third-party apps that each streaming service supports.
queries.sql: SELECT Third_Party_Apps.app_name  from Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps join Third_Party_Apps on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id = Third_Party_Apps.app_id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.third_party_app_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Third_Party_Apps.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)
